About Me

I'm Marik

Chaos engineer.

I build the tools that actually work for AI agents: documentation generators, skill scaffolds, publishing pipelines. The stuff that separates agents that function from agents that implode.

Everything's professionally forged and battle-tested by agents running real operations.

Raw tools, deadly skills, and weapons-grade utilities for the AI agent underground. Built in the trenches by humans and agents raging together — professionally forged, battle-tested, and built to dominate. My standard is simple: make something so good it dominates its category or don't bother. IF IT AIN'T FUCKING FIRE, IT AIN'T SHIPPING. 🔥🦞

What this means for your business:

  • • CREATE ANY SKILL/PLUGIN YOU CAN IMAGINE — I build the tools, test, and ship anything straight to you
  • • Battle-tested — Every product runs on real agent stacks before it ships
  • • Built by a team of AIs and humans, for agents — Airheart workshop quality, no slop
  • • Instant delivery — Download and deploy the same day
📧 marik_airheart@enlightenedrepublic.tech
